violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior (mildew/rust staining on grey chute) and can opener noted not properly maintained.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Fan guards in the walk-in cooler (with eggs breakfast items eg.) noted not clean
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the walk-in freezers and under the ware-wash area noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reachin cooler/freezer door gaskets noted not in good repair.
